# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See [standard-version](https://github.com/conventional-changelog/standard-version) for commit guidelines.

## 3.0.0
### Font Updates

- Added new and improved `@font-face` configurations needed for the Mastercard theme, including updated "Mark For MC" font settings.
- Introduced font support for the Unify theme, featuring Geist, Inter, and Geist Mono families.

Please review `fonts.html` and `README.MD` for more information on how to use these fonts. 

### Features

Please update fonts as below:

| Language                            | Old Font           |  New Font |
| ----------------------------------- | ------------------ |  ------------------|
| Arabic                              | Frutiger LT Arabic | Noto Kufi Arabic   |
| Georgian                            | MC Geo | Noto Sans Georgian |
| Japanese                            | Axis  | Noto Sans Japanese |
| Korean                              | YD Gothic | Noto Sans Korean    |
| Simplified Chinese                  | M Ying Hei | Noto Sans Simplified Chinese  |
| Thai                                | Neue Frutiger Thai | Noto Sans Thai      |
| Traditional Chinese                 | M Ying Hei | Noto Sans Traditional Chinese |
| Others Not Supporting 'Mark For MC' | Futura PT, Futura URW, Arial Unicode | Noto Sans    |


* Frutiger Arabic font files for Arabic language removed and replaced with Noto Kufi Arabic
* Futura PT font files for Cyrillic language removed and replaced with Noto Sans
* MC Geo font files for Georgian language removed and replaced with Noto Sans Georgian
* Futura URW font files for Greek language removed and replaced with Noto Sans
* Axis font files for Japanese language removed and replaced with Noto Sans Japanese
* YD Gothic font files for Korean language removed and replaced with Noto Sans Korean
* M Ying Hei font files for Simplified Chinese language removed and replaced with Noto Sans Simplified Chinese
* Neue Frutiger Thai font files for Thai language removed and replaced with Noto Sans Thai
* Arial Unicode font files removed and replaced with Noto Sans
